# GLKViewDelegate

**Protocol**

Drawing callback methods for use with a [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKView] object.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol GLKViewDelegate : NSObjectProtocol
```

## Overview

An object that implements the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewDelegate] protocol can be set as a [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKView] object’s delegate. A delegate allows your application to provide a drawing method to a [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKView] object without subclassing the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKView] class.

## Drawing the View’s Contents

- **glkView(_:drawIn:)**: Draws the view’s contents.

## OpenGL ES View Rendering

- **GLKView**: A default implementation for views that draw their content using OpenGL ES.
- **GLKViewController**: A view controller that manages an OpenGL ES rendering loop.
- **GLKViewControllerDelegate**: Rendering loop callback methods for use with a [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKViewController] object.

## Inherits From

- NSObjectProtocol

## Conforming Types

- GLKViewController
